name: Ops Dash Connector
author: Legacy Sales Engineering
changelog: 1.6.1 — CRITICAL packaging fix: the 1.5.0/1.6.0 zips were built with backslash path separators, so Linux servers extracted a single mis-named file instead of a plugin folder — installs appeared to fail and were retried. Rebuilt correctly. Also bails out safely if a duplicate copy of the plugin is present instead of fataling with 'cannot redeclare'. 1.6.0 — Self-updating from Ops Dash. 1.5.0 — robots.txt and XML sitemap management, plus heading-structure fixes.
